## Survival Condition

**Alive if**: [what should happen]
**Dead if**: [what is happening instead]

## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser (if site issue): [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
- Version/Commit: [e.g. main@abc123]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or relevant information.

## Self-Check

- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates.

- [ ] I have provided reproduction steps.
